# AgentGuard

> Runtime guardrails for AI coding agents. Stop loops, budget overruns, retry storms, and timeouts before they burn money. Zero dependencies, local-first, MIT licensed.

## Package

- Name: agentguard47
- Install: `pip install agentguard47`
- Package metadata: See `sdk/pyproject.toml` or https://pypi.org/project/agentguard47/
- Python: 3.9+
- License: MIT
- Dependencies: None (stdlib only)

## What It Does

AgentGuard stops runaway coding agents mid-run. It raises Python exceptions when budget, loop, timeout, or retry limits are hit. No dashboards required. No API keys required. Works offline.

## Key Files

| File | Description | Tokens (approx) |
|------|-------------|------------------|
| [README.md](https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47/blob/main/README.md) | Full usage guide with examples | ~3500 |

| [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47/blob/main/AGENTS.md) | Project structure, API surface, coding patterns | ~1800 |
| [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47/blob/main/CLAUDE.md) | Claude Code agent instructions | ~1800 |
| [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) | Dev setup, test commands, PR guidelines | ~600 |
| [GOLDEN_PRINCIPLES.md](https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47/blob/main/GOLDEN_PRINCIPLES.md) | 10 mechanical rules enforced by CI | ~400 |
| [docs/guides/coding-agents.md](https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47/blob/main/docs/guides/coding-agents.md) | Repo-first onboarding for coding agents | ~600 |
| [docs/guides/coding-agent-safety-pack.md](https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47/blob/main/docs/guides/coding-agent-safety-pack.md) | Copy-paste setup for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot | ~800 |

## Quick Start

```python
from agentguard import Tracer, BudgetGuard, patch_openai

tracer = Tracer(guards=[BudgetGuard(max_cost_usd=5.00, warn_at_pct=0.8)])
patch_openai(tracer)
# OpenAI chat completions are now tracked. At $4 warning fires. At $5 agent stops.
```

## Guards

| Guard | Stops | Constructor |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| BudgetGuard | Dollar/token/call overruns | `BudgetGuard(max_cost_usd=5.0, warn_at_pct=0.8)` |
| LoopGuard | Exact repeated tool calls | `LoopGuard(max_repeats=3)` |
| FuzzyLoopGuard | Similar calls, A-B-A-B patterns | `FuzzyLoopGuard(max_tool_repeats=5)` |
| TimeoutGuard | Wall-clock time limits | `TimeoutGuard(max_seconds=300)` |
| RateLimitGuard | Calls-per-minute throttling | `RateLimitGuard(max_calls_per_minute=60)` |
| RetryGuard | Retry storms on flaky tools | `RetryGuard(max_retries=3)` |

## Exceptions Raised

- `BudgetExceeded` -- budget limit hit
- `BudgetWarning` -- warning threshold crossed
- `LoopDetected` -- loop or fuzzy loop detected
- `TimeoutExceeded` -- wall-clock timeout
- `RetryLimitExceeded` -- retry storm detected

## Tracing

```python
from agentguard import Tracer, JsonlFileSink

tracer = Tracer(sink=JsonlFileSink("traces.jsonl"))
with tracer.trace("agent.run") as span:
    span.event("reasoning", data={"thought": "search docs"})
    span.cost.add("gpt-4o", input_tokens=1200, output_tokens=450)
```

## Auto-Instrumentation

```python
from agentguard import Tracer, JsonlFileSink, patch_openai, patch_anthropic

tracer = Tracer(sink=JsonlFileSink("traces.jsonl"))
patch_openai(tracer)      # tracks chat.completions.create calls
patch_anthropic(tracer)   # tracks messages.create calls
```

## Framework Integrations

```bash
pip install agentguard47[langchain]   # LangChain callback handler
pip install agentguard47[langgraph]   # LangGraph guarded_node
pip install agentguard47[crewai]      # CrewAI step callback
```

## CLI

```bash
agentguard doctor              # verify install (no network)
agentguard demo                # local proof run (no API keys)
agentguard report traces.jsonl # summarize traces
agentguard eval traces.jsonl   # assert properties in CI
agentguard incident traces.jsonl --format html  # postmortem
agentguard quickstart --framework openai         # starter snippet
```

## Repo Structure

```
sdk/                  Python SDK source
  agentguard/         Package root
    guards.py         All guard classes
    tracing.py        Tracer, sinks, spans
    instrument.py     Auto-instrumentation (OpenAI, Anthropic)
    cost.py           Per-model cost estimation
    evaluation.py     EvalSuite for CI assertions
    cli.py            CLI entrypoint
    integrations/     LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI
    sinks/            HttpSink, OtelTraceSink
  tests/              pytest suite (93% coverage)
mcp-server/           Read-only MCP server (TypeScript)
docs/                 Guides, cookbooks, competitive analysis
examples/             Runnable examples and starters
site/                 Landing page
```

## Links

- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agentguard47/
- GitHub: https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47
- Docs: https://github.com/bmdhodl/agent47/tree/main/docs
- MCP server: `npx -y @agentguard47/mcp-server`
